title: MessageQueryInput: add with_sort_ascending builder setter
description:
## Why

Every other boolean-or-optional field in MessageQueryInput and peer input structs has a with_* builder method. sort_ascending is the sole exception -- callers must mutate the field directly after construction instead of chaining .with_sort_ascending(true). This is inconsistent with the rest of the input API.

## What needs to be done

Add pub fn with_sort_ascending(mut self, v: bool) -> Self to MessageQueryInput. Update the doc comment on sort_ascending to mention the setter. Add or extend an existing test to exercise the setter in a round-trip request body test.
